calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-10-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Vivian Lerche of Pacific Attorney Group (415.680.5731) appears as moving party seeking to withdraw as counsel for plaintiff

Hugh D. Ross appears as plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Brian R. Davis of Bogaards Davis LLP (415.979.0480) appears as counsel for defendants/non-opposing parties, Kevin C. Lemons, ET AL.

The Court hears from all sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court passes the matter and directs the parties to meet and confer. The matter is recalled. Court hears from plaintiff counsel and party.

Attorneys Vivian Lerche, Pacific Attorney Group's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel is DENIED.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-547436 WITH CASE CGC-15-547037
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KEVIN LEMONS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NO. CGC-15-547436 WITH CASE NO. CGC-15-547037 is granted. The parties stipulated to consolidation and no opposition has been filed. Case number 547037 is the lead case and henceforth all papers will be filed in that case only. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR #12913. (302/HK)
